workspaceFrame.className: flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col overflow-hidden bg-background text-foreground

stageShell.className: flex min-h-0 flex-1 flex-col overflow-hidden py-24 pl-24 transition-[padding-right] duration-200 ease-out motion-reduce:transition-none sm:py-32 sm:pl-40 pr-[var(--workspace-memory-rail-stage-inset)] xl:pr-[var(--workspace-memory-rail-stage-inset-wide)]

railShell.className: absolute inset-y-0 right-0 min-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-[transform,opacity] duration-200 ease-out motion-reduce:transition-none w-[var(--workspace-memory-rail-width)] translate-x-0 opacity-100

rail.className: flex h-full min-h-0 w-full flex-col bg-card px-16 py-20

activeCard.className: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-transparent transition-colors duration-150
